items.title: Dashboard copy preserves each search-position band
items.precondition: PR 149 hardening changes are present in the worktree
items.expected: Positions 1, 2-3, 4-20, not-in-top-20, and unavailable produce distinct truthful owner-facing copy

items.title: Output guardrail preserves top-three framing
items.precondition: PR 149 hardening changes are present in the worktree
items.expected: Positions 2 and 3 retain protective top-three language while position 4 is normalized
items.evidence: Included in backend targeted run: 2 files passed, 5 tests passed

items.title: LLM prompt keeps ranking bands mutually exclusive
items.precondition: PR 149 hardening changes are present in the worktree
items.expected: Positions 4-20 target the top three, only outside-top-20 targets entry into the top 20, and unavailable stays pending
items.evidence: Included in backend targeted run: 2 files passed, 5 tests passed

items.title: Repository regression gates pass
steps: Run backend and frontend production builds
Run full backend and frontend Vitest suites
Run scoped lint on every changed source and test file
items.expected: No build, test, strict-convention, or changed-file lint errors
items.evidence: Backend build passed; frontend build passed; backend 343/343 tests; frontend 70/70 tests; strict conventions passed; changed-file lint passed
items.notes: Repository-wide frontend lint still has 3 unrelated pre-existing errors outside this PR's files.

items.title: Constitution cleanup preserves ranking behavior
items.precondition: Rev 1 cleanup changes are present in the worktree
steps: Run both renamed backend contract suites
Run the frontend ranking utility suite
Run scoped lint and the strict Constitution checker
items.expected: Named rank thresholds and mirrored test filenames introduce no behavior, type, lint, or Constitution regression
items.evidence: Backend targeted suites: 5/5; frontend ranking suite: 6/6; backend build passed; frontend build passed; full backend: 343/343; full frontend: 70/70; strict Constitution check passed; changed-file lint passed

items.title: Local Rankings overview renders through the running PR frontend
items.precondition: Local backend is running and the PR frontend is served on an isolated port
steps: Open the isolated PR frontend in the browser
Enter a client dashboard through the normal admin Pilot flow
Open Local Rankings and inspect the overview card
items.expected: The owner-facing overview renders a real Local Search position and recommended action without composite-rank or contradictory band language
items.evidence: The automated browser reached the local PR frontend previously, but no authenticated admin session was available; a later retry could not attach the in-app browser webview.
items.notes: The deterministic frontend helper suite covers #1, #2-3, #4-20, not-in-top-20, and unavailable states.
items.waiver: User explicitly authorized waiving local browser acceptance on 2026-07-14 so PR 149 can merge to dev/dave; validate the dashboard on dev after deployment.
